title: aster yomena var. yomena
intro: Aster yomena var. yomena, also known as Korean aster, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Aster yomena var. yomena include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Aster yomena var. yomena can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
